title: CRM Script Updates
summary: Updated all 4 core CRM scripts to use unified n5_core.db database with 'people' table

artifacts.description: Complete rewrite to use db_paths.py, PEOPLE_TABLE, and unified DB patterns. Commands: create, search, intel, list, stats
Updated to use get_db_connection() and PEOPLE_TABLE. CRMLookupService provides O(1) email lookups and fuzzy name matching
Updated all queries to use people table. Added get_person_deals() for deal_roles junction queries
Simplified to read from people table directly. Removed legacy enrichment_queue dependencies (queue can be rebuilt later if needed)

verification.crm_cli_stats: PASS - Shows stats with deals and interactions
verification.crm_lookup_email: PASS - Returns 'No match found' for test email

notes_for_orchestrator: crm_paths.py was already updated (by W1.1) to point CRM_DB to N5_CORE_DB - confirmed and leveraged
db_paths.py table constants (PEOPLE_TABLE, etc.) used consistently across all scripts
The old enrichment_queue table structure is NOT in n5_core.db - enrichment worker simplified to work without queue (queries people directly for enrichment candidates)
crm_calendar_helpers.py still uses old profiles table - should be addressed in separate worker if calendar webhook integration is needed
Some legacy imports (crm_paths.CRM_INDIVIDUALS) retained for markdown profile paths - these are unchanged
